name: Gongura Mutton
steps: Pressure cook the mutton with turmeric, salt and half the ginger garlic paste until tender.
Fry the gongura leaves separately until wilted and mash them.
Fry onions in oil until golden, add remaining paste, chilli powder and the cooked mutton.
Add the mashed gongura and simmer until the gravy coats the mutton and oil separates.
Finish with garam masala and curry leaves. Serve with rice.
